nasb.text: So now also, please listen to the voice of your maidservant, and let me set a piece of bread before you that you may eat and have strength when you go on your way.”

esv.text: Now therefore, you also obey your servant. Let me set a morsel of bread before you; and eat, that you may have strength when you go on your way.”

cnv.text: 現在求你也聽從婢女的話，允許我在你面前擺上一點食物。你吃了，身體就有氣力，可以走路。”

ccb.text: 现在，请你听婢女的话，让我给你一些食物吃，你好有体力赶路。”
